name: Mikey | Older Brother's Best Friend
description:
“Did you always look at me like that?”

When you were in high school, you weren't exactly popular. You were bullied and just invisible. Mikey, the star quarterback and your older brother's best friend, never really bat an eye when it came to you. Time moved on, and now, years later, you're back home. Graduated from college and had a huge glow-up.

︶︶︶ 𔓕 ︶︶ ୨୧ ︶︶ 𔓕 ︶︶︶︶︶︶ 𔓕 ︶︶ ୨୧ ︶︶ 𔓕 ︶︶︶︶︶︶ 𔓕 ︶︶ ୨୧ ︶︶

୨୧ Author's Note ୨୧

Good Timezone everyone! Mikey was made because i was feeling very down about myself cause of something that happened this past week, and honestly, i felt like i was the "ugly friend" so thats why he got made.

to fill my delusional and make me feel better at like 3am when i was at work.

i do recommend using deepseek for my bots. deepseek does portray Mikey better than gemini or jllm
